data.title: Vasta Platform Limited delisting from NASDAQ voluntarily, notifying Nasdaq of decision, Shares to be delisted.
data.description: In Sao Paulo, Vasta Platform Limited (NASDAQ: VSTA), a prominent education company in Brazil, has decided to voluntarily delist its Class A Common Shares from the Nasdaq Global Select Market. The company, a high-growth player in the education sector, notified Nasdaq of this choice. Vasta's Class A Common Shares have a par value of U.S.$0.00005 per share. The parent company, Cogna Educação S.A. in Brazil, had previously disclosed this impending delisting.

data.title: Pan American Energy extends marketing program with Upswitch Media Corp for an additional 60 days starting January 12, 2026.
data.description: Pan American Energy Corp. (PNRG) has extended its engagement with Upswitch Media Corp. for marketing services. The company, based in Calgary, Alberta, announced on January 9, 2026, that the extension will last for an anticipated 60 days starting around January 12, 2026. Upswitch Media Corp. can be contacted via email at info@upswitchmedia.com or by phone at 604-373-5875. The address of Upswitch Media Corp. is 2709B 43rd Ave., Suite 1013, Vernon, British Columbia. The engagement extension follows a previous news release on September 5, 2025. The marketing services term duration is subject to management's discretion for further extension or shortening. Pan American Energy Corp.'s stock symbols are CSE: PNRG, OTC PINK: PAANF, and FRA: SS6.

data.title: Applied Digital Corporation (Nasdaq: APLD) reported Q2 2026 financial results for the quarter ended Nov 30, 2025.
data.description: On January 7, 2026, Applied Digital Corporation (Nasdaq: APLD) announced its financial results for the fiscal second quarter ending on November 30, 2025. Applied Digital, specializing in designing, constructing, and managing high-performance, environmentally friendly data centers and colocation services for artificial intelligence, cloud computing, networking, and blockchain applications, revealed operational information alongside its financial performance.

data.title: Genelux Corporation plans a public offering of common stock on Nasdaq (GNLX). Underwriter may have option for 15% more. Market conditions can affect completion.
data.description: Genelux Corporation, a late clinical-stage immuno-oncology company based in Westlake Village, California, has announced the commencement of a proposed underwritten public offering of its common stock on Jan. 7, 2026. The company, listed as GNLX on Nasdaq, plans to offer all shares in the offering and expects to provide the underwriter with a 30-day option to acquire up to an additional 15% of the shares sold. This offering is subject to market conditions and standard closing procedures, with uncertainties regarding its completion, size, and terms.

data.title: HYTN Innovations Inc. partners with MCS Market Communication Service GmbH for marketing.
data.description: A pharmaceutical manufacturer focused on cannabis, HYTN Innovations Inc., based in Vancouver, British Columbia, disclosed on January 9, 2026, that they have partnered with MCS Market Communication Service GmbH for marketing and communication services. Traded as CSE: HYTN, FSE: 85W0, and OTC PINK: HYTNF, HYTN aims to enhance its market outreach through this collaboration.

data.title: Collective Metals amends terms for private placement, aims for $1.5 million in gross proceeds.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on January 9, 2026, Collective Metals Inc. (CSE: COMT | OTC: CLLMF | FSE: TO1) shared that it has adjusted the conditions of its non-brokered private placement funding, aiming for total earnings of about $1,499,999.93. This update comes following the original announcement on January 8, 2026, known as the "Initial News Release."

data.title: Boot Barn Holdings, Inc. released early results for Q3 FY2026, ahead of the 2026 ICR Conference. Find more info at investor.bootbarn.com.
data.description: Boot Barn Holdings, Inc., a company listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol BOOT, released preliminary results for the third quarter of fiscal year 2026. The quarter ended on December 27, 2025. The company announced these results prior to its involvement in the ICR Conference on January 12, 2026. More details can be found in the Supplementary Financial Presentation on investor.bootbarn.com. The preliminary results for the third quarter of fiscal year 2026 showcased positive performance, indicating growth and success for the Company.

data.title: OpenAccess Coalition announces 2026 Board of Directors representing 16 member companies, welcomed Google and NVIDIA in 2025.
data.description: In Round Rock, Texas, the OpenAccess Coalition has revealed its 2026 Board of Directors, now comprising 16 member companies. The Coalition saw an expansion in 2025 with the addition of representatives from Google and NVIDIA, enhancing its authority and dedication to promoting open standards within the semiconductor sector. The Board of Directors supervises the activities of the OpenAccess Coalition, which includes managing the Change Team and the Extensions Steering Group.

U.S. SUPREME COURT TO WEIGH FEDERAL COMMUNICATIONS COMMISSION'S AUTHORITY TO FINE WIRELESS CARRIERS FOR SHARING CUSTOMER DATA WITHOUT CONSENT

data.title: Nasdaq & CME Group unite to introduce Nasdaq-CME Crypto Index, as market complexity rises. Analysts predict growing interest, fueling demand for crypto index benchmarks & investment products.
data.description: Experts predict that there will be a rise in the popularity of cryptocurrency index benchmarks and investment vehicles as the market becomes more complex. This trend is expected to continue due to the increasing complexity of the market.

data.title: MES completes divestiture of non-operating subsidiaries, including Municipal Emergency Services, to permanently rid alleged PFAS-related liabilities.
data.description: On January 9, 2026, in Miami, MES Intermediate, Inc. (referred to as MES), a reputable provider of essential safety gear for vulnerable workers, revealed the successful finalization of a sale of specific non-operational branches. This included Municipal Emergency Services.

data.title: Bill introduced to ban politicians from using prediction markets like Rep. Torres' proposal to prevent insider trading.
data.description: Legislation proposed by Representative Ritchie Torres aims to prohibit government officials from participating in prediction markets due to concerns regarding insider information. The bill seeks to address instances where officials may have an unfair advantage in predicting outcomes, potentially influencing market outcomes. Torres emphasized the need for transparency and ethical conduct in government, highlighting the importance of maintaining public trust. The legislation has gained support from X co-sponsors and is currently under review in Congress. If passed, it would impact approximately X government officials at various levels across the country.

data.title: Roblox (NYSE: RBLX) facing challenges post Q3 earnings, stock dropped 32% in 6 months. Ark Invest bought 169,130 RBLX shares, potential rebound anticipated. Expert sees Roblox becoming leading entertainment platform. News article details factors impacting RBLX stock and potential for recovery.
data.description: Roblox Corp's stock (RBLX) took a hit after their third-quarter earnings report despite exceeding estimates. Management's focus on safety initiatives and rising costs led to investor concerns about future profitability. The stock plummeted by 32% in the last six months, prompting downgrades. However, signs of recovery emerged as Cathie Wood's Ark Invest acquired 169,130 RBLX shares and analyst Drew Crum touted the company's potential to become a top entertainment platform. There's a contrarian view suggesting seller exhaustion, potentially leading to a rebound in RBLX stock. This article advises readers to refer to Benzinga.com for the full story.

data.title: Colombia updates crypto tax regulations; now mandates service providers to collect and disclose user and transaction details.
data.description: Colombia's tax authority has implemented new regulations mandating that cryptocurrency service providers must gather and disclose user information and transaction details. This measure aims to enhance oversight and monitoring within the sector.

data.title: Bleichroeder Acquisition Corp. II finishes $287.5 million IPO with 28.75 million units sold at $10 each.
data.description: On January 9, 2026, Bleichroeder Acquisition Corp. II disclosed the completion of its IPO comprising 28.75 million units, with 3.75 million units from the underwriters' over-allotment option. Priced at $10.00 each, the offering generated $287.5 million in total proceeds.

Cape Town’s streets came alive as the annual Tweede Nuwe Jaar Minstrels Parade filled the city with music, colour and tradition. Minstrel troupes marched from Somerset Road to Green Point, celebrating a centuries-old festival rooted in freedom, cultural rebirth and community

data.title: First Commonwealth to host Q4 earnings call on Jan 28, 2026 at 2:00 p.m. ET. Executives to discuss results for quarter ended Dec 31, 2025. Press release to be issued on Jan 27, 2026.
data.description: First Commonwealth Financial Corporation (NYSE: FCF) based in Indiana, Pennsylvania, has scheduled a conference call on January 28, 2026, at 2:00 p.m. Eastern Time to go over financial results for the quarter that concluded on December 31, 2025. Leading the call will be T. Michael Price, the President and Chief Executive Officer, along with key executives like James Reske, Jane Grebenc, Mike McCuen, and Brian Sohocki. The company plans to release a press statement detailing its Fourth Quarter 2025 financial outcomes after the market closes on January 27, 2026.

data.title: Fulcrum Therapeutics granted stock options to three new employees under Nasdaq rule 5635(c)(4) on Jan 9, 2026.
data.description: Fulcrum Therapeutics, Inc., based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company listed on Nasdaq under the symbol FULC, has recently disclosed granting non-statutory stock options to three new employees. The stock options were issued as part of the company's 2022 Inducement Stock Incentive Plan, modified for this purpose. This move was made to attract these new employees to join Fulcrum, in compliance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

data.title: WEBUY GLOBAL LTD (Nasdaq: WBUY) notified by Nasdaq for not meeting $2,500,000 minimum stockholders’ equity for listing.
data.description: Singapore, Jan. 09, 2026 - Webuy Global Ltd (Nasdaq: WBUY) announced today that they have received a notice from Nasdaq stating non-compliance with the minimum $2,500,000 in stockholders’ equity for continuing to list their Class A Ordinary Shares on The Nasdaq Capital Market. The Nasdaq Listing Qualifications department issued the Notification Letter regarding the violation of Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(b)(1).
